message:
feat(schemas): add JSON schemas for fixture capture and family manifests

Add 5 new JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) files to validate fixture
capture artifacts and family manifests:

- canonical_fixture.schema.json — validates individual canonical
  fixture files with scenario DSL inputs, expected outputs, and
  digest checksums
- fixture_capture_manifest.schema.json — validates the top-level
  capture manifest that indexes all captured fixtures from a Rust
  baseline run
- core_fixture_family_manifest.schema.json — validates core semantic
  fixture family manifests (lifecycle, channel, timer families)
- robustness_fixture_family_manifest.schema.json — validates
  robustness fixture family manifests (boundary, failure-atomic)
- vertical_continuity_fixture_family_manifest.schema.json — validates
  vertical/continuity fixture family manifests (end-to-end profile
  parity, restart continuity)

These schemas enable CI validation of fixture artifacts to catch
structural drift before it reaches parity tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,95 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
+  "title": "asx-canonical-fixture",
+  "description": "Canonical fixture schema emitted by Rust reference capture for C conformance/parity runners.",
+  "type": "object",
+  "additionalProperties": false,
+  "required": [
+    "scenario_id",
+    "fixture_schema_version",
+    "scenario_dsl_version",
+    "profile",
+    "codec",
+    "seed",
+    "input",
+    "expected_events",
+    "expected_final_snapshot",
+    "expected_error_codes",
+    "semantic_digest",
+    "provenance"
+  ],
+  "properties": {
+    "scenario_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
+    "fixture_schema_version": {"type": "string"},
+    "scenario_dsl_version": {"type": "string"},
+    "profile": {"type": "string"},
+    "codec": {"type": "string", "enum": ["json", "bin"]},
+    "seed": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0},
+    "input": {
+      "type": "object",
+      "additionalProperties": true,
+      "required": ["ops"],
+      "properties": {
+        "ops": {
+          "type": "array",
+          "items": {
+            "type": "object",
+            "additionalProperties": true,
+            "required": ["id", "op", "args"],
+            "properties": {
+              "id": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0},
+              "op": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
+              "args": {"type": "object"},
+              "expect": {"type": "object"}
+            }
+          }
+        }
+      }
+    },
+    "expected_events": {
+      "type": "array",
+      "items": {
+        "type": "object",
+        "additionalProperties": true
+      }
+    },
+    "expected_final_snapshot": {
+      "type": "object",
+      "additionalProperties": true
+    },
+    "expected_error_codes": {
+      "type": "array",
+      "items": {"type": "string"}
+    },
+    "semantic_digest": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "pattern": "^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"
+    },
+    "provenance": {
+      "type": "object",
+      "additionalProperties": false,
+      "required": [
+        "rust_baseline_commit",
+        "rust_toolchain_commit_hash",
+        "rust_toolchain_release",
+        "rust_toolchain_host",
+        "cargo_lock_sha256",
+        "capture_run_id"
+      ],
+      "properties": {
+        "rust_baseline_commit": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "pattern": "^[0-9a-f]{40}$"
+        },
+        "rust_toolchain_commit_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 8},
+        "rust_toolchain_release": {"type": "string"},
+        "rust_toolchain_host": {"type": "string"},
+        "cargo_lock_sha256": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "pattern": "^[0-9a-f]{64}$"
+        },
+        "capture_run_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 8}
+      }
+    }
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,85 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
+  "title": "asx-core-fixture-family-manifest",
+  "description": "Manifest schema for core semantic fixture-family capture runs.",
+  "type": "object",
+  "additionalProperties": false,
+  "required": [
+    "manifest_version",
+    "run_id",
+    "family_id",
+    "rust_baseline_commit",
+    "scenario_dsl_version",
+    "fixture_schema_version",
+    "e2e_lane_id",
+    "scenarios"
+  ],
+  "properties": {
+    "manifest_version": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "const": "core-fixture-family-manifest-v1"
+    },
+    "run_id": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 8
+    },
+    "family_id": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "enum": [
+        "CORE-LIFECYCLE",
+        "CORE-OUTCOME",
+        "CORE-BUDGET",
+        "CORE-CANCEL",
+        "CORE-CHANNEL",
+        "CORE-TIMER"
+      ]
+    },
+    "rust_baseline_commit": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "pattern": "^[0-9a-f]{40}$"
+    },
+    "scenario_dsl_version": {"type": "string"},
+    "fixture_schema_version": {"type": "string"},
+    "e2e_lane_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
+    "scenarios": {
+      "type": "array",
+      "minItems": 1,
+      "items": {
+        "type": "object",
+        "additionalProperties": false,
+        "required": [
+          "scenario_id",
+          "fixture_id",
+          "prov_ids",
+          "profile",
+          "codec",
+          "semantic_digest",
+          "artifact_manifest_path"
+        ],
+        "properties": {
+          "scenario_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
+          "fixture_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
+          "prov_ids": {
+            "type": "array",
+            "minItems": 1,
+            "items": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}
+          },
+          "profile": {"type": "string"},
+          "codec": {"type": "string", "enum": ["json", "bin"]},
+          "semantic_digest": {
+            "type": "string",
+            "pattern": "^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"
+          },
+          "parity_targets": {
+            "type": "array",
+            "items": {
+              "type": "string",
+              "enum": ["rust_vs_c", "codec_equivalence", "profile_parity"]
+            }
+          },
+          "artifact_manifest_path": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}
+        }
+      }
+    }
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,112 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
+  "title": "asx-fixture-capture-manifest",
+  "description": "Schema for deterministic Rust reference fixture capture run metadata and output index.",
+  "type": "object",
+  "additionalProperties": false,
+  "required": [
+    "manifest_version",
+    "capture_run_id",
+    "generated_at",
+    "generator",
+    "baseline",
+    "schema_versions",
+    "scenarios"
+  ],
+  "properties": {
+    "manifest_version": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "const": "capture-manifest-v1"
+    },
+    "capture_run_id": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 8
+    },
+    "generated_at": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "format": "date-time"
+    },
+    "generator": {
+      "type": "object",
+      "additionalProperties": false,
+      "required": ["tool", "version", "command", "seed_mode"],
+      "properties": {
+        "tool": {"type": "string"},
+        "version": {"type": "string"},
+        "command": {"type": "string"},
+        "seed_mode": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "enum": ["explicit", "derive_from_scenario"]
+        }
+      }
+    },
+    "baseline": {
+      "type": "object",
+      "additionalProperties": false,
+      "required": [
+        "rust_baseline_commit",
+        "rust_toolchain_commit_hash",
+        "rust_toolchain_release",
+        "rust_toolchain_host",
+        "cargo_lock_sha256",
+        "cargo_lock_bytes"
+      ],
+      "properties": {
+        "rust_baseline_commit": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "pattern": "^[0-9a-f]{40}$"
+        },
+        "rust_toolchain_commit_hash": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "minLength": 8
+        },
+        "rust_toolchain_release": {"type": "string"},
+        "rust_toolchain_host": {"type": "string"},
+        "cargo_lock_sha256": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "pattern": "^[0-9a-f]{64}$"
+        },
+        "cargo_lock_bytes": {
+          "type": "integer",
+          "minimum": 1
+        }
+      }
+    },
+    "schema_versions": {
+      "type": "object",
+      "additionalProperties": false,
+      "required": ["fixture_schema_version", "scenario_dsl_version"],
+      "properties": {
+        "fixture_schema_version": {"type": "string"},
+        "scenario_dsl_version": {"type": "string"}
+      }
+    },
+    "scenarios": {
+      "type": "array",
+      "minItems": 1,
+      "items": {
+        "type": "object",
+        "additionalProperties": false,
+        "required": [
+          "scenario_id",
+          "profile",
+          "codec",
+          "seed",
+          "fixture_path",
+          "semantic_digest"
+        ],
+        "properties": {
+          "scenario_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
+          "profile": {"type": "string"},
+          "codec": {"type": "string", "enum": ["json", "bin"]},
+          "seed": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0},
+          "fixture_path": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
+          "semantic_digest": {
+            "type": "string",
+            "pattern": "^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"
+          }
+        }
+      }
+    }
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,96 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
+  "title": "asx-robustness-fixture-family-manifest",
+  "description": "Manifest schema for robustness fixture-family capture and triage artifacts.",
+  "type": "object",
+  "additionalProperties": false,
+  "required": [
+    "manifest_version",
+    "run_id",
+    "family_id",
+    "rust_baseline_commit",
+    "fixture_schema_version",
+    "scenario_dsl_version",
+    "e2e_lane_id",
+    "scenarios"
+  ],
+  "properties": {
+    "manifest_version": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "const": "robustness-fixture-family-manifest-v1"
+    },
+    "run_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 8},
+    "family_id": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "enum": [
+        "ROBUST-EXHAUSTION",
+        "ROBUST-ENDIAN-UNALIGNED",
+        "ROBUST-FAULT-INJECTION"
+      ]
+    },
+    "rust_baseline_commit": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "pattern": "^[0-9a-f]{40}$"
+    },
+    "fixture_schema_version": {"type": "string"},
+    "scenario_dsl_version": {"type": "string"},
+    "e2e_lane_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
+    "scenarios": {
+      "type": "array",
+      "minItems": 1,
+      "items": {
+        "type": "object",
+        "additionalProperties": false,
+        "required": [
+          "scenario_id",
+          "fixture_id",
+          "boundary_class",
+          "expected_failure_class",
+          "prov_ids",
+          "first_failure_pointer",
+          "semantic_digest"
+        ],
+        "properties": {
+          "scenario_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
+          "fixture_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
+          "boundary_class": {
+            "type": "string",
+            "enum": [
+              "resource_exhaustion",
+              "endian_decode",
+              "unaligned_access",
+              "fault_time",
+              "fault_entropy",
+              "fault_jitter"
+            ]
+          },
+          "expected_failure_class": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
+          "failure_atomic_expected": {"type": "boolean"},
+          "prov_ids": {
+            "type": "array",
+            "minItems": 1,
+            "items": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}
+          },
+          "first_failure_pointer": {
+            "type": "object",
+            "additionalProperties": false,
+            "required": ["failure_stage", "scenario_id"],
+            "properties": {
+              "failure_stage": {
+                "type": "string",
+                "enum": ["capture", "validate", "replay-check", "conformance", "e2e"]
+              },
+              "scenario_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
+              "op_id": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0},
+              "recommended_owner_bead": {"type": "string"}
+            }
+          },
+          "semantic_digest": {
+            "type": "string",
+            "pattern": "^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"
+          }
+        }
+      }
+    }
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,163 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
+  "title": "asx-vertical-continuity-fixture-family-manifest",
+  "description": "Manifest schema for vertical profile and crash/restart continuity fixture-family capture runs.",
+  "type": "object",
+  "additionalProperties": false,
+  "required": [
+    "manifest_version",
+    "run_id",
+    "family_id",
+    "rust_baseline_commit",
+    "scenario_dsl_version",
+    "fixture_schema_version",
+    "e2e_lane_id",
+    "scenarios"
+  ],
+  "properties": {
+    "manifest_version": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "const": "vertical-continuity-fixture-family-manifest-v1"
+    },
+    "run_id": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 8
+    },
+    "family_id": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "enum": [
+        "VERT-HFT-MICROBURST",
+        "VERT-AUTOMOTIVE-WATCHDOG",
+        "CONT-CRASH-RESTART"
+      ]
+    },
+    "rust_baseline_commit": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "pattern": "^[0-9a-f]{40}$"
+    },
+    "scenario_dsl_version": {
+      "type": "string"
+    },
+    "fixture_schema_version": {
+      "type": "string"
+    },
+    "e2e_lane_id": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "enum": [
+        "E2E-VERT-HFT",
+        "E2E-VERT-AUTO",
+        "E2E-CONT-RESTART"
+      ]
+    },
+    "scenarios": {
+      "type": "array",
+      "minItems": 1,
+      "items": {
+        "type": "object",
+        "additionalProperties": false,
+        "required": [
+          "scenario_id",
+          "fixture_id",
+          "prov_ids",
+          "core_family_links",
+          "profiles",
+          "codecs",
+          "expected_outcome_class",
+          "semantic_digest",
+          "artifact_manifest_path"
+        ],
+        "properties": {
+          "scenario_id": {
+            "type": "string",
+            "minLength": 1
+          },
+          "fixture_id": {
+            "type": "string",
+            "minLength": 1
+          },
+          "prov_ids": {
+            "type": "array",
+            "minItems": 1,
+            "items": {
+              "type": "string",
+              "minLength": 1
+            }
+          },
+          "core_family_links": {
+            "type": "array",
+            "minItems": 1,
+            "items": {
+              "type": "string",
+              "enum": [
+                "CORE-LIFECYCLE",
+                "CORE-OUTCOME",
+                "CORE-BUDGET",
+                "CORE-CANCEL",
+                "CORE-CHANNEL",
+                "CORE-TIMER"
+              ]
+            }
+          },
+          "profiles": {
+            "type": "array",
+            "minItems": 1,
+            "items": {
+              "type": "string",
+              "enum": [
+                "ASX_PROFILE_CORE",
+                "ASX_PROFILE_FREESTANDING",
+                "ASX_PROFILE_EMBEDDED_ROUTER",
+                "ASX_PROFILE_HFT",
+                "ASX_PROFILE_AUTOMOTIVE"
+              ]
+            }
+          },
+          "codecs": {
+            "type": "array",
+            "minItems": 1,
+            "items": {
+              "type": "string",
+              "enum": ["json", "bin"]
+            }
+          },
+          "expected_outcome_class": {
+            "type": "string",
+            "enum": [
+              "success",
+              "classified_error",
+              "cancelled",
+              "degraded_mode",
+              "restart_recovered"
+            ]
+          },
+          "semantic_digest": {
+            "type": "string",
+            "pattern": "^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"
+          },
+          "parity_targets": {
+            "type": "array",
+            "items": {
+              "type": "string",
+              "enum": ["rust_vs_c", "codec_equivalence", "profile_parity"]
+            }
+          },
+          "evidence_tags": {
+            "type": "array",
+            "items": {
+              "type": "string",
+              "minLength": 1
+            }
+          },
+          "artifact_manifest_path": {
+            "type": "string",
+            "minLength": 1
+          },
+          "first_failure_pointer": {
+            "type": "string",
+            "minLength": 1
+          }
+        }
+      }
+    }
+  }
+}
